task_completion.description: Verify that the 'Galapagos_Base' ground station is established with the correct coordinates.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the GPredict Ground Stations configuration window showing 'Galapagos_Base' with Latitude 0.7402 S (or -0.7402), Longitude 90.3138 W (or -90.3138), and Altitude 15m.

task_completion.description: Verify that the 'Ascension_Island' ground station is established with the correct coordinates.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the GPredict Ground Stations configuration window showing 'Ascension_Island' with Latitude 7.9467 S (or -7.9467), Longitude 14.3559 W (or -14.3559), and Altitude 10m.

task_completion.description: Verify that the default 'Amateur' module has been removed or replaced.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the main GPredict interface tabs or module list; the 'Amateur' module should no longer be visible.

task_completion.description: Verify that a new module named 'Argos_Tracking' has been created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a tab or window in the main GPredict interface explicitly named 'Argos_Tracking'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the 'Argos_Tracking' module contains the 5 specified satellites.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the 'Argos_Tracking' module's satellite list, radar view, or configuration window. It must contain these satellites: NOAA 15, NOAA 18, NOAA 19, METOP-B, and METOP-C.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the GPredict graphical user interface to make changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the GPredict application windows, menus, and dialog boxes being interacted with, rather than just terminal windows editing configuration files.

integrity.description: Verify the agent selected real satellites from the GPredict database.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots of the module configuration should show the agent searching for and selecting the satellites from the available satellite list (e.g., by NORAD ID or name), not just typing names into a text file.

integrity.description: Verify the agent entered the ground station data into the application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the 'Add Ground Station' or 'Edit Ground Station' dialog box in GPredict with the coordinates being entered.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Satellites required: NOAA 15 (NORAD 25338), NOAA 18 (28654), NOAA 19 (33591), METOP-B (38771), METOP-C (43689). Galapagos_Base coordinates: Lat -0.7402 (0.7402 S), Lon -90.3138 (90.3138 W), Alt 15m. Ascension_Island coordinates: Lat -7.9467 (7.9467 S), Lon -14.3559 (14.3559 W), Alt 10m.
